title: SystemVerilog: Assignment to part select of vector within a struct is not supported

features.name: nonblocking part select on packed struct vector field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a multi-bit vector field, where a non-blocking part-select assignment targets that struct field

features.name: multiple conditional part selects same struct field
features.description: Code should include multiple conditional non-blocking assignments to different part selects of the same vector field inside a packed struct, within the same always block
features.snippet:
if (strb[3]) control.example_a[14:7] <= pdata[31:24];
if (strb[2]) control.example_a[6:0] <= pdata[23:17];

features.name: struct concatenation assignment workaround
features.description: Code should include a full packed struct assignment using concatenation with conditional operators as a workaround for unsupported struct field part-select assignments
features.snippet: control.example_a <= {strb[3] ? pdata[31:24] : control.example_a[14:7], strb[2] ? pdata[23:17] : control.example_a[6:0]};
